name: Extra Large Bathroom Plastic Tiered Cosmetic Vanity Organizer Clear - Brightroom™: Makeup & Skincare Storage, Countertop Use
description:
Keep your countertops or cabinets neat and tidy with the help of this Extra-Large Bathroom Plastic Tiered Cosmetic Organizer from Brightroom™. With a modular, stackable design and clear plastic construction, this beauty organizer helps keep a wide variety of toiletries and cosmetics contained and organized to help keep your bathroom clutter free. The top tray features 21 compartments in a range of sizes, so you can store nail polish, brushes, mascara and more while keeping everything visible and within easy reach. A single-compartment bottom tray stacks underneath for space-saving storage.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
